title: PlayerHeads
description: A simple PaperMC plugin where you get a player's head when you kill them
body:
PlayerHeads 

**Yet another PlayerHeads plugin? Yes – but lightweight, reliable, and made with PvP in mind.**  
A simple PaperMC plugin that drops a player's head when they are killed by another player. I Just Made It for an SMP and decided to share it

 ![Won't Support Forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg) ![Supported on PaperMC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/supported/paper_vector.svg) ![Fabric Supported](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
 ![Supported on Purpur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/supported/purpur_vector.svg)  ![Supported on Spigot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/spigot_64h.png) ![Supported on Quilt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg) ![Unsupported on Sponge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/unsupported/sponge_vector.svg)  

## For The Mod

![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)

![Requires Quilted Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_vector.svg) 









##  Compatibility

| Platform   | Support      | Notes |
|------------|--------------|-------|
| **PaperMC** | ✅ Full      | Fully supported and tested |
| **Purpur**  | ✅ Full      | Fully supported and tested |
| **Spigot**  | ✅ Full      | Fully supported and tested |
| **Bukkit**  | ⚠️ Legacy    | Deprecated – not officially supported, may work |
| **Fabric**  | ✅ Full   |   Fabric Api Required
| **Quilt**   | ⚠️ Minimal   | Requires [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) may have issues |
